blended.narrative: Devil's Head is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,051 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
